creator: nobody99@gmx.at
text:
on the page http://www.freebsd.org/doc/de/books/handbook/install-pre.html#INSTALL-FLOPPIES is a link to  ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/i386/8.1-RELEASE/floppies/. this directory does not exist.

Fix: 

create a bootdisk or remove the link
How-To-Repeat: view your homepage
